2026-06-29FAOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Türkiye with concurrent accreditation as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to GeorgiaAppointment of Marcel Lebleu as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Türkiye, with concurrent accreditation as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to Georgia, with residence in Ankara.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Türkiye with concurrent accreditation as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to Georgia
precis: Appointment of Marcel Lebleu as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Türkiye, with concurrent accreditation as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to Georgia, with residence in Ankara.
